title: Raccoon Removal in New Rochelle, NY | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in New Rochelle, Westchester. Licensed experts safely remove raccoons from attics, chimneys & crawl spaces. Call today for a free quote!
intro: New Rochelle homeowners face unique challenges with raccoon infestations, particularly in the area's historic neighborhoods and waterfront properties along Long Island Sound. These intelligent mammals frequently invade attics, chimneys, and garages throughout the city, causing structural damage and health hazards. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services in New Rochelle, from humane trapping to exclusion and cleanup.
whyUs: Our licensed wildlife technicians have extensive experience serving New Rochelle's diverse residential areas, from the Victorian homes in the North End to the Tudor-style houses near Wykagyl. We offer same-day emergency service, humane removal methods, complete exclusion repairs, and warranty protection to ensure raccoons don't return to your property.
localContext: New Rochelle's mature tree canopy and proximity to nature preserves like Twin Lakes Park create ideal raccoon habitats, with animals frequently migrating into residential areas seeking shelter. The city's mix of older homes with architectural details and modern developments both present vulnerable entry points that raccoons exploit, especially during breeding season in spring and fall.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in New Rochelle typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry point repairs needed, and attic cleanup required. A single raccoon in an accessible location costs less than a mother with babies requiring extensive exclusion work and sanitization.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in New Rochelle neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common throughout New Rochelle, especially in areas near Glen Island Park, Hudson Park, and residential neighborhoods with mature trees. The city's urban-suburban mix with abundant food sources and shelter opportunities makes it ideal raccoon habitat, with increased activity during spring and fall.

faqs.question: What damage can raccoons cause to New Rochelle homes?
faqs.answer: Raccoons can cause extensive damage to New Rochelle homes including torn shingles, damaged soffits and fascia, destroyed insulation, chewed electrical wiring, and contaminated attics with feces and urine. They often exploit existing vulnerabilities in older homes and can create entry holes 4-6 inches in diameter to access attics and crawl spaces.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in New Rochelle for urgent situations. Most raccoon removals are completed within 3-7 days depending on the complexity, though cases involving mothers with babies may require additional time to ensure all animals are safely removed before exclusion work is completed.
